intelligence.target_persona: Families, nature lovers, and private groups seeking personalized and safe boat tours around Marco Island with an experienced local captain.

brand.name: Captain Bob Tours
brand.tagline: Memorable Guided Boat Tours Around Marco Island

hero.headline: Explore Marco Island's Hidden Waters with Captain Bob
hero.subtext: Private, family-friendly boat tours with an experienced local captain focused on safety and memorable adventures.

image.alt: Family enjoying a boat tour on clear coastal waters
image.image_search_query: family boat tour clear coastal waters sunny day

about.story_text: Captain Bob Tours offers personalized and small-group guided boat tours around Marco Island. With years of experience navigating local waters, Captain Bob provides unique access to hidden natural spots, ensuring a safe and comfortable journey for families and wildlife enthusiasts alike.
about.founder_note: As a lifelong resident and licensed captain, I take pride in sharing the beauty and wildlife of Marco Island with every guest, delivering unforgettable experiences tailored to your group?s needs.

trustbar.headline: Trusted by Local and Visiting Guests

features.title: Experienced Local Captain

features.title: Family-Friendly Adventures
features.description: Safe and comfortable trips that create lasting memories for visitors of all ages.

features.title: Focus on Safety and Comfort
features.description: We prioritize your safety with licensed operation and well-maintained boats for a worry-free tour.
